vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-setup
vBRIEFInfo.description: Two-color 3MF writer with per-body color metadata

plan.title: 3MF writer — two-body container with per-body color metadata

narratives.Overview: Emit a 3MF file with two distinct objects (base, pixels) tagged with their intended filament/color so dual-color slicers auto-assign extruders.
narratives.Acceptance: `qr23mf.writers.threemf.write_3mf(base: Mesh, pixels: Mesh, path: Path, *, base_color: str = '#ffffff', pixel_color: str = '#000000') -> None` writes a valid 3MF file (zip container with 3D/3dmodel.model + [Content_Types].xml + _rels/.rels). Two `<object>` entries appear in the model XML with `pid`/`pindex` pointing into a `<basematerials>` table providing the two colors. Opens cleanly in PrusaSlicer and Bambu Studio with the two bodies pre-assigned to distinct filaments. Implementation prefers `lib3mf` Python bindings when available; falls back to hand-composed XML + `zipfile` if not installed (fallback clearly marked, unit-tested).
narratives.Scope: src/qr23mf/writers/threemf.py — `write_3mf()` + small template/helpers. Tests exercise both the lib3mf and fallback paths (monkeypatch import). Determinism: xmlsort object order, stable UUIDs from a content hash (no wall clock). Zip entries written in a fixed order with deterministic timestamps (1980-01-01).
